data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of holding seats during the payment process, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or accessible through the API. While the linked use case mentions that seats are held for 10 minutes during checkout, there is no concrete evidence or API responses that demonstrate this behavior. Therefore, this indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of holding seats for 10 minutes during payment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify seat hold functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if seats are held for 10 minutes during the payment process.
